scripts.gyrii:spacetime:clean: cd games/gyrii/spacetimedb && rm -rf ~/.local/share/spacetime/data && (pkill -f 'spacetime.*start' || pkill -f 'spacetime.*dev' || true) && echo 'Cleaned SpacetimeDB build artifacts, database, and stopped processes'
scripts.gyrii:spacetime:dev: cd games/gyrii && spacetime dev --server http://127.0.0.1:3001 gyrii --yes --module-project-path spacetimedb
scripts.gyrii:spacetime:run: (npm run gyrii:spacetime:start &) && sleep 5 && npm run gyrii:spacetime:dev
scripts.gyrii:spacetime:publish: cd games/gyrii && spacetime publish gyrii --project-path spacetimedb -s maincloud
scripts.gyrii:spacetime:publish:break: cd games/gyrii && spacetime publish --break-clients gyrii --project-path spacetimedb -s maincloud
scripts.gyrii:spacetime:publish:reset: cd games/gyrii && spacetime publish --delete-data gyrii --project-path spacetimedb -s maincloud
scripts.gyrii:spacetime:publish:local: cd games/gyrii && spacetime publish gyrii --project-path spacetimedb -s http://127.0.0.1:3001
